tldr: Friend, your account is leaning hard on two creative templates — the 'CUBE to Cosmos' LIGHTSUM drop (6 near-identical variants) and 'The Usual' everyday line — and CPMs typically spike 18-30% within 7-14 days when one concept dominates this heavily. You've got one clear scaler and one obvious kill, plus three gap-filling concepts ready to brief.

benchmark.context: Fashion/jewelry DTC brands in our dataset typically see fatigue at ~22 days. OHTNYC is running ~10 days ahead of fatigue because of heavy duplication on the LIGHTSUM and 'Usual' creatives.

ads.headline: From CUBE to Cosmos — The OHT x LIGHTSUM Drop
ads.body: ₊˚⊹♡ OHT x CUBE LIGHTSUM ♡⊹˚₊ From CUBE to cosmos — a collection inspired by bold legacies and bright energy. Built for the main character era. Limited drop, made to shine on and off stage. ✧˖°⋆｡˚
drivers: Body copy is duplicated word-for-word across 6 ads (4, 5, 11, 15, 16, 18, 19)
Headline 'From CUBE to Cosmos' is identical across the cluster
Same landing page (cube-dice-necklace) used 5+ times — destination fatigue compounding

ads.headline: From CUBE to Cosmos — The OHT x LIGHTSUM Drop
ads.body: ₊˚⊹♡ OHT x CUBE LIGHTSUM ♡⊹˚₊ From CUBE to cosmos — a collection inspired by bold legacies and bright energy. Built for the main character era. Limited drop, made to shine on and off stage. ✧˖°⋆｡˚
drivers: Identical body to Ad 4 — only the landing URL (supernova-necklace) differs
Headline pattern reuse from the LIGHTSUM cluster
Limited-drop framing loses urgency when duplicated

ads.headline: Soft Enough for Daily. Sharp Enough to Feel Like You
ads.body: ₊˚⊹♡ THE USUAL ♡⊹˚₊ Not the jewelry you save for "someday." The ones you live in, grocery runs, late nights, everything between. Soft, sharp, and oht to the core ♡ Meet the usual, your everyday, upgraded ☁︎⚙︎☆
drivers: 'The Usual' headline + body is replicated in Ads 6 and 8
Strong differentiated angle (everyday wear) keeps it fresher than LIGHTSUM cluster
Headline 'Soft Enough for Daily. Sharp Enough to Feel Like You' is the highest-quality hook in the set — but it's burning through impressions in triplicate

ads.headline: For Your Weekly Jewelry Rotation
ads.body: Be unapologetically you. ✧˖°⋆｡˚ Every piece is meticulously designed to empower you to express your unique style fearlessly.
drivers: Body copy is identical to Ad 2 — same 'Be unapologetically you' opener
Generic empowerment angle lacks the specificity of 'The Usual' or LIGHTSUM

ads.headline: Layered to perfection
ads.body: Be unapologetically you. ✧˖°⋆｡˚ Every piece is meticulously designed to empower you to express your unique style fearlessly.
drivers: Headline 'Layered to perfection' is the only unique hook in this template
Body copy fully duplicated with Ad 3
Generic 'meticulously designed' line reads more catalog than OHT-voice

ad_to_scale.headline: Soft Enough for Daily. Sharp Enough to Feel Like You
ad_to_scale.body: ₊˚⊹♡ THE USUAL ♡⊹˚₊ Not the jewelry you save for "someday." The ones you live in, grocery runs, late nights, everything between. Soft, sharp, and oht to the core ♡ Meet the usual, your everyday, upgraded ☁︎⚙︎☆
ad_to_scale.why: This is the strongest creative in the account — the 'grocery runs, late nights, everything between' line nails real-life context that LIGHTSUM and Heart Heist don't. It's evergreen (no Valentine's/drop expiration), it ladders to a hero SKU (Shooting Star Earrings), and the angle has room for 5+ visual variations before fatigue. Scale it with new visuals, not new copy.

ad_to_kill.headline: From CUBE to Cosmos — The OHT x LIGHTSUM Drop
ad_to_kill.body: ₊˚⊹♡ OHT x CUBE LIGHTSUM ♡⊹˚₊ From CUBE to cosmos — a collection inspired by bold legacies and bright energy. Built for the main character era. Limited drop, made to shine on and off stage. ✧˖°⋆｡˚
ad_to_kill.why: This exact body+headline is running in 6+ duplicate placements pointing mostly at the same cube-dice-necklace LP. The 'limited drop' urgency is dead when the same ad has been live for weeks, and Meta is reading this as one fatigued creative spread thin. Kill the duplicates, keep one canonical version, and free up the LIGHTSUM angle for fresh treatments.

concepts.hook: From the CUBE stage to my F train commute.
concepts.angle: Reframe the LIGHTSUM collab around the buyer, not the artist — the 'on and off stage' line is doing all the lifting in the current ad; show it.
concepts.primary_text: ₊˚⊹♡ on stage / off stage ♡⊹˚₊ The OHT x LIGHTSUM drop wasn't just made to shine under lights — it was made for the train ride home, the 2am pizza, the mirror selfie before you leave. Bold legacies, everyday energy. ✧˖°⋆｡˚ Limited pieces, infinite main character moments.
concepts.visual_direction: Split-screen or jump-cut: stage performance footage / fan POV in NYC streetwear. Closeups on cube dice + supernova pieces in both contexts.
concepts.fills_gap: Refreshes the LIGHTSUM cluster (6+ duplicate ads) without abandoning the collab equity.

concepts.hook: 5 outfits. One pair of earrings. Zero takes off.
concepts.angle: Prove the 'soft enough for daily, sharp enough to feel like you' promise with literal proof — extend the winning hook into a format that earns more dwell time.
concepts.primary_text: ₊˚⊹♡ THE USUAL, all week ♡⊹˚₊ Monday meeting fit. Wednesday gym. Friday dinner. Saturday hangover bagel. Sunday reset. Same Shooting Star earrings. That's the whole point. ☁︎⚙︎☆ The jewelry you don't take off — because why would you?
concepts.visual_direction: 5-frame carousel, each frame a different outfit/setting in NYC, same earrings visible. Day-of-week labels in OHT's signature sparkle typography.
concepts.fills_gap: Extends the highest-quality hook in the account into a non-static format — currently 'The Usual' only exists as 3 near-identical static ads.

concepts.format: Video / 20-30s UGC, founder or in-house stylist
concepts.hook: I designed this so you'd never have to take it off.
concepts.angle: Inject a human voice — every current ad is product-led copy. A face + first-person POV is the cheapest way to break pattern in the feed.
concepts.primary_text: Real talk: most jewelry brands design for the photo. We design for the rest of your life — the shower you forgot to take it off in, the gym bag, the redeye. ♡ That's why every OHT piece is surgical steel and built for daily wear. Express loud. Live louder. ✧˖°⋆｡˚
concepts.visual_direction: Handheld, vertical, founder/stylist in NYC apartment or studio. B-roll of pieces being worn through real moments — sleeping, washing dishes, dancing.
concepts.fills_gap: Zero talking-head or founder-led creative in current rotation. Adds a trust/authenticity layer that pure product ads can't deliver.

unlocks: Cut 5+ duplicate LIGHTSUM placements before they drag account-level CPMs up another 15-25%
Free up budget currently being eaten by 6 versions of the same ad and redirect to 'The Usual' scaling
Add a human/UGC layer the account currently lacks — every live ad is product-on-flat-lay energy
Buy ~14-21 more days of fresh creative runway before the next forecasted fatigue cliff

next_step.urgency: Three of your top-volume ads hit forecasted fatigue between May 7-11 — that's this week.
next_step.headline: Let's map the next 30 days of OHT creative on a 30-min call
next_step.body: I'll walk you through which exact ads to kill this week, which to scale, and a prioritized brief for the 3 concepts above. No pitch deck — just the plan, screen-shared.

method_note: Scoring is based on observable creative signals (copy duplication, headline patterns, CTA/LP repetition, launch clustering) from public ad library data — not on impression or spend data, which would tighten forecasts further.
